name: Mac 文件自动整理
description: 按文件类型自动将指定目录（如下载文件夹）中的文件分类整理到子文件夹：图片、视频、文档、压缩包、其他。

steps.name: 创建分类目录
steps.description: 在源目录下创建分类子文件夹

steps.name: 整理图片
steps.description: 移动图片文件到 Pictures 目录
steps.command: cd ~/Downloads && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname '*.jpg' -o -iname '*.jpeg' -o -iname '*.png' -o -iname '*.gif' -o -iname '*.webp' -o -iname '*.heic' -o -iname '*.tiff' \) -exec mv {} Pictures/ \; && echo '图片整理完成'

steps.name: 整理视频
steps.description: 移动视频文件到 Videos 目录
steps.command: cd ~/Downloads && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname '*.mp4' -o -iname '*.mov' -o -iname '*.avi' -o -iname '*.mkv' -o -iname '*.wmv' -o -iname '*.flv' -o -iname '*.m4v' \) -exec mv {} Videos/ \; && echo '视频整理完成'

steps.name: 整理文档
steps.description: 移动文档文件到 Documents 目录
steps.command: cd ~/Downloads && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname '*.pdf' -o -iname '*.doc' -o -iname '*.docx' -o -iname '*.xls' -o -iname '*.xlsx' -o -iname '*.ppt' -o -iname '*.pptx' -o -iname '*.txt' -o -iname '*.md' -o -iname '*.pages' -o -iname '*.numbers' \) -exec mv {} Documents/ \; && echo '文档整理完成'

steps.name: 整理压缩包
steps.description: 移动压缩文件到 Archives 目录
steps.command: cd ~/Downloads && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname '*.zip' -o -iname '*.tar' -o -iname '*.gz' -o -iname '*.rar' -o -iname '*.7z' -o -iname '*.dmg' -o -iname '*.pkg' \) -exec mv {} Archives/ \; && echo '压缩包整理完成'

steps.name: 生成整理报告
steps.command: echo '=== 整理结果 ===' && for d in Pictures Videos Documents Archives; do count=$(ls ~/Downloads/$d 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "$d: $count 个文件"; done
